examples.target: She refused to {acknowledge} her mistake.

examples.target: Can you {calculate} the total cost?

examples.target: The committee {comprises} ten members.

examples.target: {Loneliness} is more common in large cities.

examples.target: {Nostalgia} makes the past seem better than it was.

examples.target: The old photographs triggered {nostalgia}.

examples.target: The instructions were {ambiguous} and confusing.
